ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the patient's medical conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "living_wills" (
  "living_will_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each living will record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the living will */,
  "has_will" TEXT /* Indicates if the patient has a living will (Y/N/I/U) */,
  "on_file" TEXT /* Indicates if the living will is on file (Y/N) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information provided by the patient (if any) */,
  "will_date" TEXT /* Date when the living will was created or last updated */,
  "will_version" TEXT /* Version number of the living will */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the living will */,
  "next_of_kin" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the next of kin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("living_will_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_living_wills_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES will_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_living_wills_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "will_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value representing the status (e.g., Y, F, N, I, U) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the status is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Living Will, Healthcare Proxy) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "chapter_number" TEXT /* Number representing the chapter */,
  "chapter_description" TEXT /* Description of the chapter */,
  "chapter_order" INTEGER /* Order of the chapter */,
  "chapter_content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the chapter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
